spectrum/location_reference_name_number.description: A unique name, number, or identifier for a display or storage Location. It can also apply to a Location on a computer system used for digital objects.

spectrum/location_condition_note.description: Information about the condition of the location, including such as the environmental conditions or state of cleanliness.

spectrum/environment_measurement_type.description: The type of environment condition measured at a location.

spectrum/location_date.description: The date an object was place at the Current location.

spectrum/current_location_fitness.description: A term describing the extent to which an object's current location is fitted to an object's requirements.

spectrum/current_location_note.description: Information about the reason for an object's being at its Current location.

spectrum/date_association.description: How a Date relates to an event in an object's history.

spectrum/date_earliest_single.description: The earliest probable or exact date at which an event in an object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/date_latest.description: The latest probable date at which an event in an object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/date_period.description: A textual expression of the period when an event in an object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/date_text.description: The textual expression of the date or date span when an event in an object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/date_earliest_single_certainty.description: A term describing the extent to which the Date - earliest/single recorded is thought to be correct.
spectrum/date_earliest_single_certainty.title: Spectrum/Date Earliest Single Certainty

spectrum/date_earliest_single_qualifier.description: A qualification of the earliest probable or exact date at which an event in an object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/date_latest_certainty.description: A term describing the extent to which the Date - latest recorded is thought to be correct.

spectrum/date_latest_qualifier.description: A qualification of the latest probable date at which an event in the object's history is thought to have occurred.

spectrum/dimension_value_date.description: The date on which the Dimension value was recorded.
spectrum/dimension_value_date.title: Spectrum/Dimension Value Date

spectrum/material_component.description: A significant component, inclusion or trace in the material of which an object or specimen is made. This could also include a patina or corrosion product which has developed on an object and is of sufficient significance to require documenting.

spectrum/material_component_note.description: To record further information about a Material component.

spectrum/material_name.description: The name commonly used to designate a particular or characteristic material, and additional to or further defining the basic material itself. This may be the vernacular or generally used name for a certain type of material or a brand name.

spectrum/material_source.description: The geographical origin of naturally occurring vegetable, animal or geological materials which either have been used to form an object or form specimens or deposits in their own right eg a quarry source for stone, country of origin of timber, geological outcrop for imported stone or fossil. (Note that this is separate from Object production place which is where the original materials are modified by human intervention to form an object).

spectrum/object_component_information.description: The unit of information describing an Object component name.

spectrum/object_name_currency.description: A statement of the status of an Object name.

spectrum/object_name_level.description: A statement of the position of the Object name in a classification scheme.

spectrum/object_name_note.description: Additional information about the Object name.

spectrum/object_name_system.description: The classification system from which the Object name is taken.

spectrum/object_name_type.description: The type of Object name recorded.

spectrum/object_name_title_language.description: The language for an Object name, Other name or Title given to an object.

spectrum/organisations_history.description: Information about the history of the Organisation.

spectrum/organisations_sub_body.description: The name of the sub-body of an Organisation.

spectrum/place_reference_number.description: A code describing a Place associated with an object, excavation or specimen.

spectrum/place_name.description: The name or title by which the Place is normally known.

spectrum/place_association.description: The way in which a Place is associated with the object.

spectrum/place_context.description: A number, code or term identifying physical evidence of an archaeological event, such as a wall, pit or ditch.

spectrum/place_coordinates.description: The precise location of a place expressed according to a chosen system.

spectrum/place_environmental_details.description: Environmental information relevant to an object, such as details about preservation conditions of the surrounding matrix.

spectrum/place_feature.description: The name by which a feature associated with an object is normally known.

spectrum/place_note.description: Additional information about Place which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/place_owner.description: The owner of a Place associated with an object.

spectrum/place_position.description: A precise position in a Place, usually to record the finding of an object in field collection.

spectrum/place_status.description: A formal administrative or scientific status assigned to a Place.

spectrum/place_type_system.description: The classification system from which the Place feature type is taken.

spectrum/place_coordinates_qualifier.description: The measurement of accuracy of a given for Place coordinates.

spectrum/place_coordinates_type.description: The locating system used to describe the coordinates of a Place.

spectrum/place_feature_date.description: The date of the Place feature.

spectrum/place_feature_type.description: The nature or category of Place feature recorded.

spectrum/place_reference_number_type.description: The category of Place reference number recorded.

spectrum/catalogue_number.description: The number assigned to an object in an exhibition catalogue.

spectrum/document_location.description: Where a referenced document is stored in an organisation's documentation system.

spectrum/reference_author_editor.description: The Person or Organisation responsible for the intellectual content of a referenced work.

spectrum/reference_association.description: A single term describing the nature of the relationship between the Reference and an object.

spectrum/reference_details.description: Details, pages, and illustrations of a bibliographic reference.

spectrum/reference_note.description: Details of the specific nature of the relevance of the Reference to the object, including an abstract if required.

spectrum/reference_number.description: A number or identifier unique to a Reference.

spectrum/reference_publication_date.description: The Date when a referenced work was published.

spectrum/reference_publication_place.description: The Place where a referenced work was published.

spectrum/reference_publisher.description: The Organisation or Person responsible for the publication of a referenced work.

spectrum/reference_title.description: The title of a referenced work.

spectrum/reference_type.description: A term describing the nature of the Reference.

spectrum/related_object_association.description: The nature of the relationship of an object to the object being documented.

spectrum/related_object_note.description: A narrative description of the nature of the relationship of an object to the object being documented.

spectrum/stratigraphic_unit_type.description: The nature of the Stratigraphic unit name from which a field collection was made.

spectrum/stratigraphic_unit_note.description: Additional information about a Stratigraphic unit name.

spectrum/technical_attribute_measurement.description: The unit of measurement used when measuring a Technical attribute.

spectrum/technique_type.description: A term describing the nature of the Technique.

spectrum/text_reference_number.description: The unique identifier for a text.

spectrum/text_note.description: Information about a text that is not recorded elsewhere.

spectrum/text_reason.description: The reason why a text was created.

spectrum/acquisition_provisos.description: Restrictions applying to the objects in a single acquisition, including conditions for deposition of archaeological archives.

spectrum/acquisition_reason.description: The reason or justification for an acquisition.

spectrum/acquisition_reference_number.description: A unique identifying number for information on the acquisition of an object or group of objects. It should serve as the reference to written documentation of a valuation. This will normally be the object number.

spectrum/acquisition_source.description: The People, Person or Organisation from whom an object was obtained, if different from the Owner. The Acquisition source may be an agent or other intermediary between the acquiring organisation and the Owner. For archaeological archives, use Acquisition source to record the excavating body responsible for preparing and depositing the archive with the organisation.

spectrum/age.description: The numeric age of a natural science specimen when it died. Use Age unit to describe the unit of measurement used and Age qualifier to qualify the information. Use Phase for a textual description of Age.

spectrum/age_qualifier.description: A qualification of the statement of the Age of a natural science specimen.

spectrum/age_unit.description: The unit of measurement used to describe the Age of a natural science specimen.

spectrum/associated_activity.description: An activity associated with an object or group of objects.

spectrum/associated_concept.description: A concept associated with an object or group of objects.

spectrum/associated_cultural_affinity.description: A wider cultural context to which an object or group of objects relates.

spectrum/associated_date.description: A date associated with an object or group of objects.

spectrum/associated_event_date.description: The date of an event in an object's history.

spectrum/associated_event_name.description: An historical event associated with an object or group of objects, not including production and collections management events. Use the Object history note to describe details about the nature of the association.

spectrum/associated_event_organisation.description: An Organisation associated with an event in an object's or group of objects' history (other than field collection or ownership).

spectrum/associated_event_people.description: A people associated with an event in an object's or group of objects' history (other than field collection or ownership).

spectrum/associated_event_person.description: A person associated with an event in an object's or group of objects' history (other than field collection or ownership).

spectrum/associated_event_place.description: A place associated with an event in an object's history.

spectrum/associated_object.description: An object associated with an object or group of objects.

spectrum/associated_object_type.description: A term describing the nature of the Associated object.

spectrum/associated_organisation.description: An Organisation associated with an object's or group of objects' history.

spectrum/associated_people.description: A people associated with an object's or group of objects' history.

spectrum/associated_person.description: A person associated with an object's or group of objects' history.

spectrum/associated_place.description: A place associated with an object or group of objects.

spectrum/association_note.description: A narrative description of the nature of the association of an organisation, people, person or place, with the object being recorded (eg design influences and design impact).

spectrum/association_type.description: The way in which the person/group, date, object, concept, event, activity or place is associated with the history of an object or specimen.

spectrum/brief_description.description: A text description of an object in approximately one sentence; normally used for administrative and identification purposes. It records the most important information from a number of separate descriptive units of information.

spectrum/collections_review_result.description: The result of a collections review for an object or group of objects for a Collections review criterion.

spectrum/comments.description: Additional comments made about an object by visitors, curators or researchers.

spectrum/completeness.description: A single term describing the completeness of an object.

spectrum/condition.description: A single term describing the condition of an object.

spectrum/condition_check_assessment_meth.description: The method used when carrying out a condition check or technical assessment process.

spectrum/condition_check_assessment_date.description: The date(s) on which a condition check or technical assessment process took place.

spectrum/condition_check_assessment_note.description: Additional information about the condition checking or technical assessment process which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/condition_check_assessment_reas.description: The reason for a condition check or technical assessment process taking place.

spectrum/condition_check_assessment_refe.description: A unique identifying number for the condition checking or technical assessment process. It should serve as the reference to written documentation of a condition check or technical assessment.

spectrum/condition_checker_assessor.description: The Person or Organisation which carried out a condition check or technical assessment process.

spectrum/conservation_authoriser.description: The Person giving final approval for a conservation job to take place.

spectrum/conservation_material.description: The materials used in the conservation of an object.

spectrum/conservation_method.description: The method used in the conservation of an object.

spectrum/conservation_note.description: Additional information about conservation of an object, or group of objects, which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/conservation_reference_number.description: A unique identifying number for the conservation of an object or group of objects. It should serve as the reference to written documentation of conservation.

spectrum/conservator.description: The Person or Organisation treating an object.

spectrum/content_activity.description: An activity depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_concept.description: A concept depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_date.description: A date depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_description.description: A general description of a depiction in an object, or description of an object without making interpretation. This may include descriptions of the content of all audio and visual works. Use Brief description and Physical description to describe an object's other features.

spectrum/content_event_name.description: An event depicted on or described by an object.

spectrum/content_language.description: The language of the textual content of an object.

spectrum/content_note.description: Additional information about an object's content which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/content_object.description: An object depicted in or described by another object.

spectrum/content_object_type.description: A term describing the nature of the Content - object.

spectrum/content_organisation.description: The Organisation depicted in or described in an object.

spectrum/content_other.description: An aspect of the content depicted in or described in an object, not covered by the other content units.

spectrum/content_other_type.description: The type of aspect being recorded by Content - other.

spectrum/content_people.description: A People depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_person.description: A Person depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_place.description: A Place depicted in or described by an object.

spectrum/content_position.description: The position on an object of a depiction or description.

spectrum/content_script.description: The script the textual content of an object.

spectrum/copy_number.description: A number assigned to an object by the maker within a limited edition or special run.

spectrum/credit_line.description: Text acknowledging a donation or loan, normally used on a display label.

spectrum/current_location.description: The place within the organisation where an object is currently located.

spectrum/current_reproduction_location.description: The current location of a reproduction.

spectrum/deaccession_date.description: The date when an item was struck off the accession register.

spectrum/dimension.description: The aspect of a part or component of an object being measured.

spectrum/disposal_authoriser.description: The Person giving final approval for a disposal to take place.

spectrum/disposal_date.description: The date an object is disposed of.

spectrum/disposal_method.description: The way in which an object is disposed of.

spectrum/disposal_new_object_number.description: The object number assigned to a deaccessioned object by the recipient.

spectrum/disposal_note.description: Additional information about the disposal of an object which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/disposal_price.description: The total price paid for an object when disposed of through sale. Associated with the Object number. If no individual prices are known for specific objects in the group, use Group disposal price.

spectrum/disposal_provisos.description: Restrictions applying to all the objects to be disposed of.

spectrum/disposal_reason.description: The reason or justification for an object or objects being disposed of.

spectrum/disposal_recipient.description: The People, Person or Organisation receiving an object to be disposed of by way of transfer, gift or sale.

spectrum/disposal_reference_number.description: The unique number assigned to the disposal of an object or group of objects. The number should also refer to a file containing all written documentation about the disposal.

spectrum/distinguishing_features.description: A description of features which could uniquely identify an object, bringing together details from other groups of units of information such as identification, inscription, and condition which could in a sentence uniquely identify an object.

spectrum/edition_number.description: A number assigned to a group of objects produced at the same time by the maker.

spectrum/entry_date.description: The date on which an object or group of objects enters the organisation.

spectrum/entry_method.description: The method by which an object or group of objects is deposited.

spectrum/entry_note.description: Additional information about the deposit of an object which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/entry_number.description: A unique number assigned to the entry of an object or group of objects and used to track objects prior to their return or acquisition. It should serve as the reference to written documentation of objects entering the organisation for the first time. The number should be the one assigned to an entry form or receipt.

spectrum/entry_reason.description: The reason for an object or group of objects physically entering the organisation.

spectrum/field_collection_date.description: The date an object is collected in the field.

spectrum/field_collection_event_name.description: The name of an event at which an object was collected.

spectrum/field_collection_method.description: The method used to excavate or collect an object in the field.

spectrum/field_collection_note.description: Additional information about the place or method of field collection or excavation.

spectrum/field_collection_number.description: A number or code assigned to an object collected in the field before an Entry number or Object number is assigned.

spectrum/field_collection_place.description: The place where an object was excavated or collected in the field.

spectrum/field_collection_source.description: The social, socio-professional, or ethnic groups from which an object was collected or bought. May be different from the group of production and/or the group use.

spectrum/field_collector.description: The Person or Organisation responsible for collecting a specimen or object in the field.

spectrum/form.description: The method used to mount or preserve a specimen.

spectrum/geological_complex_name.description: The name of a geological complex from which a geological specimen was collected.

spectrum/group_disposal_price.description: The total price paid for a group of objects at disposal including taxes for which the purchase is liable. If individual prices are known for specific objects in the group, use Disposal price.

spectrum/group_purchase_price.description: The total price paid for a group of objects at acquisition, including taxes for which the purchase is liable. If individual prices are known for specific objects in the group, use Object acquisition price.

spectrum/habitat.description: A term describing the surroundings and environment of the area where a specimen was collected in the field.

spectrum/habitat_note.description: Additional information about the habitat of an object which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/hazard.description: Details of potential hazards to people or other objects that the handling and storing of an object can present.

spectrum/inscription_content.description: The text inscribed as part of the decoration or construction of an object recorded in the original language.

spectrum/loan_in_status.description: The status of the process of carrying out a loan in (borrowing) event.

spectrum/material.description: The basic materials and media from which an object is constructed.

spectrum/normal_location.description: The place within the organisation where an object is normally located.

spectrum/number_of_objects.description: A record of the number of objects at the next level down in an object record.

spectrum/object_component_name.description: The non-separable part or component of an object which is being described.

spectrum/object_history_note.description: The history of an object, including its creation, owners, vendors and the circumstances surrounding such events. Record information here which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology.

spectrum/object_name.description: A description of the form, function or type of object.
spectrum/object_name.title: Spectrum/Object Name

spectrum/object_number.description: A unique number identifying an object or specimens, including any separated parts.
spectrum/object_number.title: Spectrum/Object Number

spectrum/object_offer_price.description: The price at which an object is offered for sale to the organisation.

spectrum/object_production_date.description: The date when a stage in the design, creation or manufacture of an object took place.

spectrum/object_production_note.description: Additional information about an object's production.

spectrum/object_production_organisation.description: An Organisation involved in the design, creation or manufacture of the object.

spectrum/object_production_people.description: A People involved in the design, creation or manufacture of an object.

spectrum/object_production_person.description: A Person involved in the design, creation or manufacture of an object. This may include the commissioner of an object.

spectrum/object_production_place.description: A Place where the design, creation or manufacture of an object took place.

spectrum/object_production_reason.description: The reason why an object was produced.

spectrum/object_purchaser_offer_price.description: The price which the organisation offers for the purchase of an object.

spectrum/object_purchase_price.description: The total price paid for an object at acquisition, including taxes for which the purchase is liable. Associated with the Object number. If no individual prices are known for specific objects in the group (eg a lot bought at auction), use Group purchase price.

spectrum/object_status.description: A statement of the standing of a natural science specimen or other object in relation to others in existence.

spectrum/original_object_purchase_price.description: The price paid for an object in the original currency at the time of purchase.

spectrum/other_number.description: An alternative number for an object other than the Object number.

spectrum/owner.description: Details of a People, Person or Organisation who owned an object before title was transferred to the organisation.

spectrum/owners_reference.description: Documentation of any additional reference to the object provided by a previous owner, eg an event, object, document, person or organisation.

spectrum/ownership_dates.description: The dates when a People, Person or Organisation owned the title to an object.

spectrum/ownership_place.description: The Place where an object was owned before title was transferred to the organisation.
spectrum/ownership_place.title: Spectrum/Ownership Place

spectrum/phase.description: A textual expression of the age or developmental phase of a natural science specimen.

spectrum/physical_description.description: Use normal grammar and punctuation. Include a description of an object's completeness if appropriate (eg lacks left arm). Comment on condition only as it affects completeness. Describe items which would be made using an object, eg clothing from paper patterns. The frame and mount should also be described if appropriate. The following issues might be addressed: What shape or form does it take? Describe an object in reference to the direction the work faces (ie a sculpture's right side (proper right) not as the viewer). Do not use 'sinister' or 'dexter'. Where and how is it decorated? How is it mounted? How is it constructed? What colours have been used? What scale is used?

spectrum/recall_date.description: The date on which the next stage of a conservation process is due.

spectrum/related_object_number.description: The Object number of an object which is related to the object being documented.

spectrum/reproduction_date.description: The date on which a reproduction was created.

spectrum/reproduction_description.description: A description of features which could uniquely identify a reproduction.

spectrum/reproduction_format.description: The analogue format or digital file format of the reproduction.

spectrum/reproduction_number.description: A unique identifier for the reproduction.

spectrum/reproduction_status.description: The status of a reproduction, especially among multiple copies.

spectrum/responsible_department_section.description: The department or section of the organisation responsible for the management of the object or group of objects.

spectrum/right_begin_date.description: The first date on which a right is current.

spectrum/right_end_date.description: The last date on which a right is current.

spectrum/right_holder.description: The holder of the right associated with an object, reproduction, or text.

spectrum/right_note.description: Any details of the right not covered elsewhere.

spectrum/right_type.description: The specific type of right being recorded in relation to an object, reproduction, or text.

spectrum/sex.description: The gender of an animal specimen.

spectrum/special_requirements.description: Requirements that may be unique or special to a particular object.

spectrum/stratigraphic_unit_name.description: The stratigraphic unit from which a field collection was made.

spectrum/style.description: Styles or schools relating to an object.

spectrum/technical_attribute.description: A technical attribute possessed by an object which can be described and/or quantified.

spectrum/technical_attribute_measurement.description: The measurement of a named Technical attribute.

spectrum/technique.description: Processes, methods, techniques or tools used to fabricate or decorate an object.

spectrum/text.description: A piece of interpretive text, or label, which was created for a use of an object or group of objects.

spectrum/text_reference_number.description: The unique identifier for a text.

spectrum/title.description: The name assigned to an object or group of objects by the artist/creator or collector at the time of origin or subsequent titles either specifically assigned or generally understood to refer to it.

spectrum/treatment_begin_date.description: The date at which the treatment of an object, or group of objects began.

spectrum/treatment_end_date.description: The date at which the treatment of an object, or group of objects ended.

spectrum/usage.description: A single term describing the use of a particular kind of object.

spectrum/usage_note.description: The use of a kind of object by the original or subsequent owners.

spectrum/use_begin_date.description: The date on which a use began.

spectrum/use_end_date.description: The date on which a use ended.

spectrum/use_note.description: Additional information about the use which has not been recorded elsewhere using controlled terminology. This could include an object's operations log.

spectrum/use_organiser.description: The Person or Organisation organising a use event (eg exhibition, display, and demonstration).

spectrum/use_reference_number.description: The unique number assigned to the use of an object or group of objects. The number should also refer to a file containing all written documentation about the use.

spectrum/use_request_note.description: Additional information about request for use.

spectrum/use_restriction.description: A record of the restrictions on the use to an object or group of objects.

spectrum/use_result.description: Information about the outcome of the use.

spectrum/use_title.description: The name of a use event (eg exhibition title).

spectrum/use_type.description: A term describing the nature of the use event.

spectrum/use_venue.description: The Place where a use takes place.

spectrum/user.description: The Person or Organisation researching, using, selecting or viewing an object or group of objects.

spectrum/users_reference.description: Documentation of any additional reference to the object provided by a user eg an event, object, document, person or organisation.
